title: Firework Helper
description: Firework Helper is a mod that allows you to use fireworks with a keybind.
body:
Firework Helper Mod for Minecraft
Firework Helper is a simple yet useful mod that lets you use firework rockets with a custom keybind, making Elytra flying much easier and smoother. Instead of having to manually select and use rockets from your hotbar, you can just press a key and the mod will automatically launch a rocket from your hotbar.


![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B244Ajzm/images/fb2769ff04db00f4389dc093bd0f79edafb6e00d.gif)
